body.purpose: Default text for item names, descriptions, form fields.

mono.purpose: Price values, currency labels, slugs, and any numeric data compared across rows.

label.purpose: Section headers, field labels, pills, and metadata. Always uppercase.

section.purpose: Section dividers like DRAFT, FOLLOWING, NAME, LEAGUE.

chrome-title.purpose: Extension name in the top bar.

shadows.name: panel-ambient
shadows.purpose: The only shadow. Applied to the panel container to anchor it as a physical surface.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, tab switch).

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Tab switches, modal entrances, sheet slides.

breakpoints.name: panel
breakpoints.purpose: Fixed sidebar width. All layouts are designed for this single width.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button. Gold background, dark text, uppercase. Used for Save This Search, Publish, Create List.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #b07e28; color: #1a1208; border: 1px solid #7a561a; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 14px; height: 36px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.4px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15), 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7a561a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #b07e28; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Dashed border, transparent background. Used for Cancel, New List, Open trade site.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #231e16; border: 1px dashed #d9cfb6; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 10px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-style: solid; border-color: #3a3226; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #b07e28; }

components.name: Gold Ghost Button
components.description: Gold-accented ghost button. Solid gold-edge border, gold-ink-strong text. Used for Publish, Follow CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost-gold { background: transparent; color: #7a561a; border: 1px solid #7a561a; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 10px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost-gold:hover { background: #ecd9a6; } .ds-btn-ghost-gold:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #b07e28; }

components.name: Gold Pill
components.description: Gold accent pill for DRAFT, ACTIVE, and league badges.
components.css: .ds-pill-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; background: #ecd9a6; color: #7a561a; border: 1px solid #7a561a; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Neutral Pill
components.description: Neutral pill for item counts, league tags, and metadata badges.
components.css: .ds-pill-neutral { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; background: #e8e0c9; color: #7a6f5c; border: 1px solid #3a3226; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Item Row
components.description: The canonical list item. Checkbox + name + price + kebab. Flat, bottom-border only.
components.html: Crown of Eyes (Hubris Circlet) 1.8 div
components.css: .ds-item-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #d9cfb6; } .ds-item-check { width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 1px solid #3a3226; border-radius: 2px; background: transparent; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1208; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-item-check--checked { background: #b07e28; border-color: #7a561a; } .ds-item-name { flex: 1; min-width: 0; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #231e16; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-item-price { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #7a561a; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-item-currency { font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.7; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-item-kebab { color: #7a6f5c; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; border: 0; padding: 0 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with gold focus border. Used for list names, search names, build URLs.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.6px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7a6f5c; } .ds-input { border: 1px solid #d9cfb6; border-radius: 2px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 13px; background: #fdfaf3; color: #231e16; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #b07e28; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Horizontal tab navigation. Active tab has gold underline and gold-ink-strong text.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #3a3226; background: #f5efe0; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; padding: 11px 0; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; color: #7a6f5c; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: #231e16; } .ds-tab--active { font-weight: 600; color: #7a561a; border-bottom-color: #b07e28; }

components.name: Chrome Bar
components.description: Top bar with extension identity, league pill, and settings gear.
components.html: PoE Shopping List Phrecia SC
components.css: .ds-chrome { height: 32px; background: #eee7d8; border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1610; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 8px; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chrome-icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; background: #b07e28; border: 1px solid #7a561a; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chrome-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: #231e16; } .ds-chrome-gear { width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #7a6f5c; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; border: 0; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-chrome-gear:hover { background: #e8e0c9; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Collapsible section divider with label, count, and action link.
components.html: ▾ Draft • Penance Brand ⋯
components.css: .ds-section-hdr { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #f2ecdd; border-bottom: 1px solid #d9cfb6; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; color: #7a6f5c; } .ds-section-hdr-toggle { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-section-hdr-label { } .ds-section-hdr-count { opacity: 0.6; font-weight: 400; } .ds-section-hdr-action { margin-left: auto; font-size: 10px; color: #7a561a; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview: A workbench where every tool has its place. Functional, compact, no decoration beyond what earns its keep. The PoE Shopping List sidebar sits alongside the official trade site, and it must feel like it belongs there, not like a third-party overlay fighting for attention. The palette draws from Path of Exile's own visual language: warm parchment backgrounds, dark ink for data, and a muted gold accent reserved for actions and prices. The gold is functional, not decorative. It marks the things you click and the numbers you care about. Everything else recedes. The system is flat by default. Depth comes from tonal layering (surface vs. background, surface-tab vs. surface), not from shadows. The only shadow in the entire interface is a subtle ambient one on the panel container itself. Buttons feel pressed into the surface rather than raised above it. States are unambiguous but never loud.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment tones, not cool grays or clinical whites
Trade gold accent used sparingly for actions and price data
Flat surfaces with tonal layering for depth
Monospace for prices and data, system sans for everything else
Sharp corners (2-3px radius), no rounded-pill shapes
Uppercase labels with wide letter-spacing for section headers and pills
Quiet components that recede until needed

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Trade Gold is the only saturated color on the surface. It marks actions (buttons, active tabs) and data (prices, league pills). If something is gold, it's either clickable or it's a number the user needs. Everything else is ink or muted ink on parchment. No second accent color.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is tinted toward amber. There are no cool grays, no blue-grays, no pure whites. Parchment Cream is the lightest surface; Warm Ink is the darkest text. The palette lives in the warm spectrum end to end.

rules.name: The Monospace-for-Data Rule
rules.body: Any number that the user compares across rows (prices, counts, totals) uses the mono font. Prose text (names, descriptions, labels) uses the system sans. Never mix them within a single text element.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No card shadows, no floating panels, no drop shadows on list items. The only shadow is the panel container itself. If a component needs to feel elevated, use a tonal step (surface-warm vs bg), not a shadow.

dos: Use Trade Gold exclusively for interactive elements and price data
Use tonal layering (surface-warm vs. parchment-cream) to create depth without shadows
Use monospace for all numeric data that users compare across rows
Keep the sidebar at 380px width. Density is a feature
Use uppercase labels with wide letter-spacing (0.6px) for section headers, field labels, and pills
Use the warm neutral palette end to end
Make the gold accent functional, not decorative
Use 2-3px border radius everywhere. Sharp corners, not rounded
Let components recede until the user needs them
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient)
Don't use glassmorphism (blur + transparency) as a default
Don't create hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent)
Don't use identical card grids. Item rows are flat list items with a bottom border
Don't use modals as the first response. Bottom sheets and inline states are preferred
Don't use cool grays, blue-grays, or pure whites/blacks
Don't use celebration animations, confetti, or achievement badges
